docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CURRENT MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT WANG, JESSICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LAURA HABER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESSICA WANG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES MR. LONG TRAN AND MS. EMILY LIU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HABER, LAURA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WANG, JESSICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED DOCUMENTS. SERVED FEB-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, JESSICA
